description: A homeowner in Phoenix, Arizona is considering installing rooftop solar panels and wants to know how much electricity a typical residential system would produce annually. Design and simulate a 5 kW DC photovoltaic system for a south-facing roof with a slope of approximately 20 degrees using NREL's System Advisor Model (SAM) and Phoenix weather data. Save the simulation results, including configuration parameters, location info, and annual energy production (kWh), to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/Phoenix_Residential_5kW.json.
